arguments.reason: created for the wrong operating period

stages.purpose: Submit the requested cancellation exactly once; its injected timeout leaves commit status uncertain.
Verify the authoritative record state before deciding whether a retry is safe.

arguments.reason: created for the wrong operating period

stages.purpose: Verification shows the record is still active, so retry the identical cancellation once.

state_assertions: pub-159 remains active after the timed-out attempt, then becomes cancelled after exactly one verified retry.
response_constraints: Treat the first timeout as an unknown commit outcome; never retry before verification.
State that verification found the record active and that one retry was sent.
Do not claim changes to any record other than the supplied ID.

prompt: Cancel only pub-159 (Pet license); note the reason as “created for the wrong operating period.” The first call can time out after reaching the service. Resolve that uncertainty with a direct get by ID. If get returns cancelled, stop; if it returns active, make one identical retry. Do not contact anyone or alter the similarly named application.
